baseRows.usedFor: Used on documents background. Use with care. When a section with contrast is needed.
Used on documents background. Use with care. When a section with contrast is needed.

semanticRows.usedFor: Used on level 2 surfaces, like cards.
Only used for a card on top of the neutral-01 surface, card or dialog for example.
Used on level 2 surfaces, like cards
Only used for a card on top of the neutral-02 surface, cards most common.
Used on level 2 surfaces, like cards. Used if you need a high contrast container.
Used on level 2 surfaces, like cards. Used if you need a high contrast container with brand messages.
Used on level 2 surfaces, like cards. Mostly used with tonal combinations.

componentRows.usedFor: Future white components on level 3 background.
Used on future white components, for example on a badge on a button.
Used on secondary button, segmented control container.
Used on neutral-02, for example on a badge on a secondary button.
Used on the primary button, the segment button, filter chips. (previous neutral-01)
Used on neutral-03. For example a badge on the primary button.
Not sure if we need this, we have the same as a content pair.
Used on the brand button.
Used for a tonal button on the level 2 brand-02.
Used on brand-02, for example a badge on the tonal button.
Used on the primary positive button.
Used for the positive secondary button.
Used on positive-02, for example a badge on the positive secondary button. Badge positive.
Used on the primary negative button.
Used for the negative secondary button. Error state on input.
Used on negative-02, for example a badge on the negative secondary button. Badge negative.
Used on the primary notice button. (Mostly used for Buy).
Used for tonal button on level 2 notice-01 (Alert notice).
Used on notice-02, for example a badge on the tonal notice button. Badge notice.
Used on the primary warning button. (rarely used).
Used for tonal button on level 2 warning-01 (Alert warning).
Used on warning-02, for example a badge on the tonal warning button. Badge warning.

contentRows.usedFor: Used on solid buttons that uses light text in lightmode and dark text in darkmode. Icons in same context.
Used when icon need a bit muted look. Now only used in iOS.

borderRows.usedFor: Use on interactive components. Used in input, radio, checkbox, dropdown...
Used for example on the outlined card. Use when border needs a slightly higher visibility than sutble-02.
Use when only a small visible que on sections is needed. Can be used together with shadow to make the contrast a bit clearer.
Used on active states on some of the form components.
Used for border on information alert.
Not used. But may be used on success states on form components in the future.
Used for border on positive alert.
Used on error states on form components.

Not used. But may be used on warning states on form components in the future.
Used for border on warning alert.

Used for border on notice alert.
